flags.description: Every qualifying supplier has a compliance penalty (compliance_score < 1.0). The category requirements may be over-specified, or the supplier pool is poorly matched to this category.
All supplier quotes exceed the budget by more than 20% (cheapest quote is 98.9% over budget). The budget may be too low for this category or quantity.
4 suppliers are ranked within 0.0171 points of each other (threshold: 0.05). The ranking adds little decision value — any quote may be equivalent.
The preferred-supplier 10% bonus elevated 'WPP Performance Media' from rank 0.0360 to 0.0396, above the next-ranked supplier at 0.0396. Without the bonus this supplier would not have ranked #1.
Preferred supplier restricted due to: 'Boutique Creator Network' was explicitly requested but excluded — category_l2 mismatch ('Influencer Campaign Management' != 'Search Engine Marketing (SEM)').
